Grand ballroom with dust-covered crystal chandeliers, cracked marble floors, and faded gilt-edged mirrors reflecting eternal night.
Castle tower study lined with leather-bound grimoires, guttering candles dripping wax onto parchment-strewn oak desks.
Crypt with ornate stone sarcophagi bearing carved angels, flickering torchlight casting dancing shadows on burial vaults.
Gothic cathedral nave bathed in crimson moonlight filtering through rose windows depicting fallen saints.
Overgrown courtyard garden at midnight, dead fountain choked with ivy, blood-red roses climbing crumbling stone walls.
Wine cellar with vaulted brick ceiling, thick cobwebs between dusty bottles aging for forgotten centuries.
Balcony of obsidian stone overlooking fog-shrouded valley beneath a massive blood moon hanging low.
Ruined abbey with collapsed roof open to stars, moonlight pooling on moss-covered flagstones and broken pews.
Mirror gallery lined with tarnished gilt frames, each reflecting the chamber but never her immortal form.
Victorian parlor with burgundy velvet furniture, dying fireplace embers, and heavy brocade drapes blocking dawn.
Underground passage with iron torch sconces, carved gargoyle reliefs watching from ancient stone walls.
Rooftop of highest gothic spire overlooking sleeping medieval city shrouded in mist below.
Throne room with obsidian seat, tattered banners hanging from vaulted ceiling, floor littered with rose petals.
Library with spiral staircase, floor-to-ceiling shelves of occult texts, single candelabra illuminating reading lectern.
Chapel with shattered crucifix, overturned pews, and altar cloth stained dark beneath pale moonbeams.
Bedchamber with four-poster canopy bed draped in black silk, silver candelabras burning beside velvet pillows.
Banquet hall with long table set for phantom guests, crystal goblets filled with dark wine.
Bell tower interior with massive bronze bell, wooden beams, and open arches framing the night sky.
Armory displaying ancient swords and armor on stands, single torch illuminating suits of tarnished plate.
Conservatory with shattered glass ceiling, dead exotic plants in urns, moonlight streaming through broken panes.
Drawing room with harpsichord collecting dust, oil paintings of long-dead nobles watching from damask walls.
Dungeon with rusted iron chains, water dripping from ceiling, single barred window revealing starlight.
Music room with pipe organ, scattered sheet music yellowed with age, candles melted into brass holders.
Observatory tower with brass telescope, star charts on walls, dome open to reveal constellations above.
Mausoleum entrance with marble columns, stone angels weeping over sealed doors, eternal flames in bronze braziers.
